---
title: "CritiCoder: End-to-End Uncertain Regression for Robust Macroscopic Pressure Models in Water Distribution Systems"
authors:
  - "Shunyu Wu"
  - "J. Wang"
  - "H. Xu"
  - "S. Zhao"
  - "J. Xu"
year: 2023
venue: "IEEE Transactions on Computational Social Systems"
status: "published"
type: "first-author"
doi: "10.1109/TCSS.2023.3272330"
url: "https://doi.org/10.1109/TCSS.2023.3272330"
keywords:
  - "uncertainty modeling"
  - "water distribution networks"
  - "robust regression"
selected: true
toc: false
---

**Status:** Published  
**DOI:** [10.1109/TCSS.2023.3272330](https://doi.org/10.1109/TCSS.2023.3272330)

This work introduces an uncertainty-aware end-to-end pressure modeling approach for water distribution systems to support robust anomaly-aware operations.
